cases.prompt: 이 Python 코드의 race condition 버그 어떤 모델로 고쳐야 할까?

assertions.text: The agent classifies this task as CODE_FIX.
The agent recommends a primary, secondary, and cost-fallback model for the fix.
The agent includes API model IDs and a rationale drawn from the SimonKWiki ai-model-benchmarks.

cases.prompt: 이 1000 페이지 문서 전체 읽고 X 주제 조사 요약해줘

assertions.text: The agent classifies this task as RESEARCH.
The agent recommends a long-context model with primary/secondary/cost-fallback options.
The agent gives API IDs and a benchmark-grounded rationale.

cases.prompt: 브라우저 열어서 X 사이트에서 데이터 자동으로 긁어오는 모델 추천

assertions.text: The agent classifies this task as COMPUTER_USE.
The agent recommends a model suited to browser automation with primary/secondary/cost-fallback.
The agent justifies the choice with benchmark evidence such as OSWorld and includes API IDs.
